description: Generate a power curve for the pre-loaded NREL 5MW wind turbine project in QBlade using a Turbine BEM Simulation. Configure the simulation with a Cut-in Wind Speed of 3 m/s, Cut-out Wind Speed of 25 m/s, 6% Losses (Efficiency 94%), and a Range of 1 m/s to 30 m/s with a 0.5 m/s Step, ensuring Variable Speed and Variable Pitch are enabled. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/projects/NREL5MW_turbine_sim.wpa. Document the maximum power output, the maximum power coefficient (Cp), and the approximate rated wind speed in a report at /home/ga/Documents/projects/power_curve_report.txt.
